name: feature.app-builder.agents
description: App Architect agent (ADR 0153 Phase 2). Turns a product idea into a structured multi-screen app design rendered in the EXISTING chat artifact workbench and editable full-screen — composes the AI chat + the feature.app-builder.nodes pack; no new chat surface. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: App Architect
agents.description: Turns a product idea into a structured multi-screen app design (screens, components, connectors) rendered live in the artifact workbench. Uses openwop:feature.app-builder.nodes.render.
